generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a responsible citizen, you know how important it is to be prepared. Did you know that investing in civil defense isn't just about security—it's about respecting our shared duty to protect our communities? While some argue it's a burden, smart preparedness actually strengthens our national resilience without compromising our freedoms. Let's ensure our leaders prioritize practical, duty-driven solutions that keep us all safe. #CivilDefenseMatters #DutyAndPreparedness
